task_updates.executor_notes: Threaded `bot.payment_service` through the admin-chat retry/release tools and gated both actions on `reconcile_with_chain(...)` before any DB mutation. Both tools now fail closed when `payment_service` is missing, return reconciled truth for `reconciled_confirmed`/`reconciled_failed`, hold on `keep_in_hold`, and only mutate on `allow_requeue`. Verification covered direct tool calls plus dispatcher wiring via `execute_tool(...)` in the full module test run.

Added the slash-only `/payment-resolve` command to `PaymentUICog` with the admin gate enforced inside the callback body using `ADMIN_USER_ID`. The callback reports `decision`, `reason`, current row `status`, and a redacted signature in an ephemeral code block. Verification covers non-admin rejection and all reconcile decision branches. A grep over `src/features/admin_chat/tools.py` for `payment_resolve|execute_payment_resolve` returned no matches, preserving the no-LLM-surface constraint.

Added `rpc_unreachable` handling in `SolanaProvider` and bridged it into `PaymentService` recovery/confirmation paths. Connection-family lookup failures now return `rpc_unreachable`, while a legitimate confirmation wait-budget timeout still returns `timeout`. Both `_confirm_submitted_payment(...)` and `recover_inflight(...)` now manual-hold with `rpc_unreachable: confirmation RPC offline`, and existing `reconcile_with_chain(...)` already keeps such rows in hold from T2. Verification includes provider sentinel tests plus service-level tests for both call sites.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Verified the dispatcher now passes `bot` for both `retry_payment` and `release_payment`, both tools fail closed when `payment_service` is missing, and `reconcile_with_chain(...)` runs before any DB mutation. Module tests cover missing service plus `reconciled_confirmed`, `reconciled_failed`, `allow_requeue`, and `keep_in_hold` branches for both tools, along with dispatcher routing.

Verified `/payment-resolve` checks `ADMIN_USER_ID` inside the callback body, reports all reconcile decision branches through the UI callback tests, and `rg -n "payment_resolve|execute_payment_resolve" src/features/admin_chat/tools.py` returned no matches.

Verified `rpc_unreachable` is emitted only from connection-family failures in `SolanaProvider`, while a responsive confirmation wait-budget timeout still returns `timeout`. Both `_confirm_submitted_payment(...)` and `recover_inflight(...)` now branch to the distinct `rpc_unreachable: confirmation RPC offline` manual-hold reason, and `reconcile_with_chain(...)` already treats `rpc_unreachable` as `keep_in_hold` from T2.
